tools.name: AIRAJ HackSaw
tools.description: Multi-purpose hacksaw with adjustable blade tension for cutting metal, plastic, and wood. Accommodates standard 12-inch hacksaw blades.

tools.description: Lead-free soldering station with adjustable temperature control for precision electronics assembly and repair. Features a ceramic heating element for stable temperature output.

tools.name: Apple Pencil
tools.description: First-generation Apple Pencil stylus for iPad with pressure and tilt sensitivity. Used for digital sketching, design work, and annotation in creative apps.

tools.name: BGA Rework Station
tools.description: Specialized rework station for removing and re-soldering Ball Grid Array (BGA) components on printed circuit boards. Provides controlled hot-air flow for precise IC-level repairs.

tools.name: BOSCH GST 150 BCE
tools.description: Professional barrel-grip jigsaw with 780W motor, variable speed, and orbital action for cutting wood, metal, and plastic. Features SDS tool-free blade change and anti-vibration system.

tools.name: Bambu Lab X1-Carbon Combo 3D Printer
tools.description: High-speed CoreXY FDM 3D printer with multi-color AMS (Automatic Material System), lidar-assisted auto calibration, and hardened steel nozzle for engineering-grade filaments. Build volume 256×256×256 mm, prints at up to 500 mm/s.

tools.name: Bantam Desktop PCB Milling Machine (Othermill Pro)
tools.description: Precision desktop CNC mill designed specifically for milling printed circuit boards and soft metals. Features a 26,000 RPM spindle with 0.001" accuracy and an enclosed, compact footprint.

tools.name: Bantam Tools Desktop CNC Milling Machine
tools.description: Desktop CNC mill for PCB prototyping, engraving, and milling of aluminum, brass, and plastics. Features automatic tool length measurement, material locating, and a fully enclosed design.

tools.name: Bofa AD500 Fume Extractor
tools.description: Industrial fume extraction system with HEPA and activated carbon filters, designed for laser cutting and soldering environments. Captures particulates and VOCs to maintain safe air quality.

tools.name: Brother Compact Monochrome Laser Printer
tools.description: Compact black-and-white laser printer for fast document printing, labels, and reference sheets. Reliable workhorse for general-purpose makerspace printing needs.

tools.name: Cowryman Router Plane
tools.description: Woodworking hand plane for smoothing and leveling grooves, dados, and mortises. Features an adjustable blade depth for precise, controlled material removal.

tools.name: Cricut Easy Press 3
tools.description: Heat press for applying iron-on vinyl (HTV) to fabric and other materials. Bluetooth-connected with precise temperature and timer control up to 400°F.

tools.name: Cricut Maker® 3
tools.description: Digital cutting machine that cuts 300+ materials including vinyl, fabric, balsa wood, and leather. Features 10x cutting force and compatibility with Smart Materials for matless cutting.

tools.name: DEWALT DCB107 12V/20V MAX Lithium Ion Charger
tools.description: Charger compatible with all DEWALT 12V and 20V MAX lithium-ion battery packs. Charges a compact battery in approximately 90 minutes with LED charge indicator.

tools.name: DEWALT Orbital Sander DWE6421

tools.name: DREMEL Workstation 220
tools.description: Drill press stand and tool holder for Dremel rotary tools, converting them into a benchtop drill press for precision drilling and routing. Provides controlled, repeatable plunge depth.

tools.name: DeWalt Drill (DCD777C2)

tools.name: Dremel 3000
tools.description: Variable-speed rotary tool operating at 5,000–32,000 RPM for grinding, sanding, cutting, polishing, and engraving across a wide range of materials. Compatible with all standard Dremel accessories.

tools.description: Mobile dust extraction unit with HEPA filtration and auto-start function that activates when a connected Festool power tool is turned on. Captures fine dust for clean workshop operation.

tools.name: Festool Bench

tools.name: Form 2
tools.description: Formlabs desktop SLA (stereolithography) 3D printer with 145×145×175 mm build volume and 25-micron XY resolution. Supports a wide selection of engineering, dental, and specialty resins.

tools.name: Form 4
tools.description: Formlabs latest-generation MSLA 3D printer with fast print speeds (up to 100 mm/hr), an 11.2"×7" build platform, and Low Force Display technology for exceptional surface accuracy.

tools.name: Form Cure

tools.name: Form Wash
tools.description: Formlabs automated wash station for cleaning SLA 3D prints in isopropyl alcohol. Accommodates parts up to 17.5 cm tall with programmable wash cycles.

tools.name: GoPro 7 Hero Black
tools.description: 4K60 action camera with HyperSmooth video stabilization, waterproof to 33 ft without a housing, and voice control. Used for documenting projects and workshop activities.

tools.name: HAKKO FX-888D
tools.description: Digital soldering station with adjustable temperature (120–899°F), rapid heat recovery, and multiple interchangeable tips. Industry-standard tool for electronics prototyping and rework.

tools.name: HP Sprout (J4W72AA#ABA)
tools.description: All-in-one desktop PC with a built-in 3D scanner, Intel RealSense depth camera, and projected touch mat for 3D scanning, design, and creative workflows.

tools.name: Heat Gun (TruePower / DrillMaster)
tools.description: Dual-temperature heat gun for workshop tasks including shrink tubing, paint softening, bending plastics, and adhesive removal.

tools.name: Hercules Sanding Sheets
tools.description: Replacement sanding sheet packs in various grits for use with orbital sanders and hand sanding blocks. Hook-and-loop or adhesive-backed for quick changes.

tools.name: Hi-Spec 16 Piece Metal Hand & Needle Files Tool Set Kit
tools.description: Set of 16 precision metal files in various profiles (flat, round, half-round, triangular, square) for deburring, shaping, and finishing metal and plastic parts.

tools.name: Husky Coping Saw
tools.description: Fine-toothed frame saw for making intricate curved and interior cuts in wood, plastic, and thin metal. Features a quick-release blade tension mechanism.

tools.name: Infrared IC Heater
tools.description: Infrared heating station for BGA and IC rework, providing focused radiant heat for component removal and soldering on circuit boards without damaging surrounding parts.

tools.name: KOOTANS Spokeshave Planer
tools.description: Adjustable flat-bottom spokeshave for shaping curves, chamfers, and rounded edges on wood. Ideal for chair legs, tool handles, and sculptural woodworking.

tools.name: Label Maker AC Adapter
tools.description: AC power adapter for a handheld label maker, providing wall-outlet power as an alternative to batteries for extended labeling sessions.

tools.name: MAKITA Plunge Base
tools.description: Plunge base attachment for the Makita RT0701C compact router, converting it into a plunge router for mortise cutting, inlay work, and template routing.

tools.name: MAKITA RT0701C
tools.description: 1-1/4 HP compact router with variable speed (10,000–30,000 RPM), slim ergonomic body, and quick-release cam lock system for easy bit changes.

tools.name: Marples MPS10189 Japanese Style Pull Saw
tools.description: Japanese-style pull saw with crosscut teeth for clean, precise cuts in wood. Pull-stroke cutting design requires less force and produces a thinner kerf than western saws.

tools.name: Marvey Hotwire Foam Cutter
tools.description: Heated nichrome wire tool for cutting and shaping expanded polystyrene (EPS) foam. Ideal for architectural models, rapid prototyping, and scenic fabrication.

tools.name: Matter and Form 3D Scanner
tools.description: Desktop 3D scanner that captures objects up to 9.8"×7" using structured light technology. Outputs STL, OBJ, and PLY files for 3D printing and digital modeling.

tools.name: Mayku Form Box Vacuum Former
tools.description: Desktop vacuum forming machine that heats and molds plastic sheets over custom forms using standard 12"×12" sheets. Used for rapid prototyping of molds, packaging, and enclosures.

tools.name: Meta Quest 2 VR Headset
tools.description: Standalone VR headset with 1832×1920 per-eye resolution, 6DOF inside-out tracking, and hand tracking support. Used for immersive design review, spatial computing, and VR prototyping.

tools.name: Original Prusa i3 MK3S+ Enclosure Bundle
tools.description: Acrylic enclosure kit for the Prusa i3 MK3S+ 3D printer, providing temperature stability and noise reduction for printing ABS, ASA, and other temperature-sensitive filaments.

tools.name: Oscilloscope Textronix
tools.description: Tektronix digital oscilloscope for visualizing and measuring electrical signals in the time and frequency domains. Essential for electronics debugging, signal analysis, and circuit verification.

tools.name: PEACHTREE WOODWORKING SUPPLY PVC Hose
tools.description: Flexible PVC dust collection hose for connecting woodworking machines to dust extractors and shop vacuum systems. Maintains airflow while resisting collapse under suction.

tools.name: POWERTEC Hose Coupler (70136)
tools.description: Quick-connect coupler for joining dust collection hoses, allowing easy tool-to-tool switching on a central dust collection system without tools.

tools.name: Plunge Cut Track Saw TS 55 REQ-F-Plus
tools.description: Festool precision track saw with 1200W motor and plunge-cut action for straight, splinter-free cuts in sheet goods and solid wood. Used with a guide rail for table-saw-quality rip and crosscuts.

tools.name: Plywood Stacking Rolling Cart
tools.description: Mobile workshop cart for storing and transporting sheet goods, plywood, and large flat materials around the makerspace.

tools.name: Prusa i3 MK3S+
tools.description: Open-source FDM 3D printer with 250x210x210mm build volume, removable magnetic steel sheet bed, and automatic mesh bed leveling. Supports PLA, PETG, ASA, ABS, and flexible filaments.

tools.name: RYOBI Drill Press
tools.description: Benchtop drill press for precise, repeatable drilling operations in wood, metal, and plastic. Features adjustable speed settings and depth stop.

tools.name: SKIL Multi - Detail Sander

tools.name: SMD Rework Station

tools.name: SPEAR & JACKSON Traditional Brass Back Tenon Saw 9550B

tools.name: STANLEY 20-221 10-Inch 12 Points Per Inch SharpTooth Mini Utility Saw

tools.name: STANLEY Hand Planer, Contractor Grade, Low Angle

tools.name: STANLEY Heavy Duty Extreme Staple Gun TR150
